creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:

  Obtained from:  http://www.mail-archive.com/debian-bugs-dist@lists.debian.org/msg678527.html

                  http://cve.mitre.org/cgi-bin/cvename.cgi?name=CVE-2009-2414
